professions.title: Wildlife Conservationist
professions.description: Wildlife conservationists in the llamaverse manage protected habitat for non-dominant species — most prominently, the fragile human populations that inhabit designated reserves in several northern territories. The profession requires both scientific knowledge and considerable diplomatic skill, as debates over habitat expansion versus economic development are among the most contentious in llamaverse politics.
professions.secretPowerAdvantage: Druid's Sight — perceives ecological imbalances directly
